title: Ceate: Fallen Angels (server)
description: The server side version of the modpack Create: Fallen Angels
body:
**This project is serverside, if you want the pack with optimization and other QOL mods go to [this page](https://modrinth.com/modpack/creative_fallen_angels)**.

This pack is mostly for people managing servers or for server providers.

This pack includes mostly serverside mods and no quests because those are on the main page.

The appeal of this pack is mainly create and farmers delight. 
Nearlly all the mods are create addons or decoration.

Oh and I will be periodically updating the mods to their new version and once all the mods have a 1.21 vesion the pack in it's whole will be updated to that version and the 1.20.1 version will recieve no more updates
